message:
fix(mvcc): qualify SmallVec as smallvec::SmallVec to close build

My previous commit (f5d7f9a9 "perf(mvcc): thread cached chain_len from
publish…") used a bare `SmallVec` type path assuming the crate-level
use was already in scope. It wasn't — smallvec is imported in several
siblings but not in lifecycle.rs — and the build broke on clean clone.

Switched to the fully-qualified `smallvec::SmallVec<[usize; 8]>` at
both the signature and the local binding. Clean build restored. Not
switching to an `use smallvec::SmallVec;` at the top of the file
because this is the only reference in lifecycle.rs and I'd rather pay
the qualification at the call site than pollute the module namespace
for a single type.
